flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Sierra College rose 42% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.8k → $5.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Sierra College rose 28% between 2007 and 2010 ($520 → $668).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Sierra College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Sierra College fell 82% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.9k → $1.4k).
